title: eritrichium minimum
intro: Eritrichium minimum, also known as Dwarf Fleabane or Western Fleabane, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Boraginaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eritrichium minimum include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to improve wound healing and boost the immune system. Eritrichium minimum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional herbal medicine to make salves and ointments for topical application.
